subcodes.title: Words to some Christians, spoken on 1914-12-26
subcodes.first_line: The deeds which are perpetrated by the present civilized Christian nations of Europe are opposite to the commandments of Christ. He shuns their association
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @call to action, @justice and wrath of God, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence, @critique of Western values; culture, @war and peace, @Christian doctrine and practice
